description_long: This is a mature deciduous tree with a broad, rounded canopy densely packed with green foliage. The trunk is relatively thick and dark brown, showing a rough, textured bark at the base. The branches radiate outward and upward, supporting a lush mass of leaves that obscure much of the inner structure. The leaves are small, numerous, and appear to be of the broadleaf type, forming a dense, almost spherical crown. The tree's overall silhouette is symmetrical, making it suitable for urban parks, sidewalks, or residential streets. No visible roots extend above the ground, and the trunk is the only part in contact with the surface.
description: A large, mature deciduous tree with a dense, rounded canopy of green broadleaves and a thick, textured trunk.
description_view_0: The tree is seen from the front, showing a full, rounded canopy and a thick, dark trunk at the center.
description_view_1: This view highlights the symmetry of the canopy and the trunk, with foliage appearing slightly more open on the right side.
description_view_2: The tree appears almost circular from this angle, with dense foliage obscuring most of the trunk except at the base.
description_view_3: The canopy is dense and rounded, with the trunk partially visible and foliage forming a nearly complete sphere.
